calendar.matters:
Notice To Vacate Writ Of Possession, Set Aside Judgment, Reopen Default, Adn Strike Order Following Hearing On Deft'S Motion To Quash Service Of Process
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Roger Balt, 209-840-3469, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT ROGER BALT'S Notice To Vacate Writ Of Possession, Set Aside Judgment, Reopen Default, Adn Strike Order Following Hearing On Deft'S Motion To Quash Service Of Process IS DENIED FOR INSUFFICIENT SERVICE. MOTION FILED AND SERVED BY MAIL ON 2/23/07. EARLIEST HEARING DATE COULD BE 3/26/07. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE OF THIS MOTION WAS DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)

Motion To Quash Service Of Process
Off Calendar Dec-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Roger Balt, 209-840-3469, defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona

No other appearances on this matter. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ROGER BALT'S Motion To Quash Service Of Process is denied. 5 days to answer. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PHA/JF) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
